title: Garlicky Sous Vide Chicken Breast
description: Tender and flavorful chicken breast cooked sous vide to perfection, served with a side of stir-fried vegetables.
instructions: Preheat the sous vide machine to 130°F (54°C).
Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
Sear the chicken breast in a pan with olive oil until browned on both sides.
Place the chicken breast in a sous vide bag and seal.
Cook the chicken breast sous vide for 1 hour.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the stir-fried vegetables to the pan and cook until tender.
Slice the cooked chicken breast into thin slices.
Serve the chicken breast with the stir-fried vegetables.
Garnish with garlic and serve hot.
